name: @backstage/loading-to-is-pending
description: Backstage 1.51.0: Rename deprecated loading prop to isPending in @backstage/ui and data-loading to data-ispending in CSS

scripts.test: yarn exec codemod jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/codemod.ts ./tests && yarn exec codemod jssg test -l css ./scripts/codemod-css.ts ./tests-css && yarn exec codemod workflow validate -w workflow.yaml
